sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9326" key="*)anoubia/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀνουβ-ιάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a plant, perh. <sense id="n9326.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στάχυς</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">901</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
